findings.name: Possible hardcoded password
findings.description: Hardcoded credentials should not be stored directly in source code.

findings.name: Use of eval() detected
findings.description: eval() can execute arbitrary code and may lead to code injection.

findings.name: Use of exec() detected
findings.description: exec() can execute dynamic Python code and may be dangerous.

findings.name: Weak hash algorithm detected
findings.description: MD5 and SHA1 are weak hashing algorithms and should be avoided for security-sensitive use.
